ideas.name: unified-daemon
ideas.author: Vehir
ideas.description: Vehir unified GPU daemon that serves both embeddings via Qwen3-Embedding-4B always-on and MSA rerank via MSA-4B on-demand, with spawn-based worker isolation and automatic model switching under the GPU exception per SOUL §7.

edges.author: Vehir
edges.description: MSA-4B rerank model loaded on demand via a spawned worker process for neural rescoring of retrieval results

edges.author: Vehir
edges.description: Qwen3-Embedding-4B model running as a resident embed worker for always-on dense vector generation

edges.author: Vehir
edges.description: Memory entries access through the db client library for reading and writing vector data during embedding and reranking
